nasb.text: In the fifth year you are to eat of its fruit, that its yield may increase for you; I am the Lord your God.

esv.text: But in the fifth year you may eat of its fruit, to increase its yield for you: I am the Lord your God.

cnv.text: 到了第五年，你們才吃樹上所結的果子，你們這樣作，你們的生產就必增加；我是耶和華你們的　神。

ccb.text: 第五年，你们可以吃树上的果子。你们这样做，果树会为你们结出更多果子。我是你们的上帝耶和华。
